abstract.text: This protocol can be implemented by any classes that can
generate keyboard layouts in various ways.

inlineContent.text: KeyboardKit will automatically setup a standard protocol
when the keyboard is launched. You can change or replace
it at any time to customize the keyboard layout.

abstract.text: This protocol is used to let device-based services share
behavior, when basing a layout on different device types.
